title: Gun Master  : pro du tir
description: If you like action movies and games with invincible assassins, then Gun Master is for you! Take on the challenge and attack all your rivals to cover yourself in glory. In Gun Master, show that you are a professional, the best of the best secret agents! At the beginning of the game, a horde of robots attacks you. To survive, kill every last one of them with your gun! Don't forget the hostages... These robots are hardened criminals who have locked up their victims. Defeat them all to save the captives and become a hero!
instructions: aim at the bad guys and shoot them
